main.description: Allocate a WID account from the server inventory for the authenticated user. Returns the QR code URL needed to onboard the W Identity app. The caller must already have an active session (unverified account type). Returns an error if the inventory is empty.

qrCodeUrl.description: URL of the WID onboarding QR code image. Display this so the user can scan it with the W Identity app to provision their WID.

expiresAt.description: ISO timestamp after which this allocation expires and the QR code may no longer be valid.

errors.name: InventoryEmpty
errors.description: No WID accounts are available in the server inventory. Try again later or contact support.

errors.name: AlreadyLinked
errors.description: This account already has a W Identity association.
